expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]是总尺寸，[BoardThick]是顶板、底板和侧板的厚度，[BackBoardThick]是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือตัววัดทั้งหมด, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ล่าง และข้าง, [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước gỗ cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm trên, dưới và bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyales ng Itaas, Ibaba at Gilid na Bato, [BackBoardThick] ay ang kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းအတိုင်းအတာဖြစ်ပြီး [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊အောက်နှင့်ခြမ်းဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ခံဘုတ်ပစ္စည်းအထူဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាតួលេខគែមសម្រាប់ទូ។ [Width], [Height], [Depth] ជាទំហំសរុប, [BoardThick] ជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងលើ, ខាងក្រោម និងចំហៀង,[BackBoardThick] ជាកម្រាស់សម្ភារៈបន្ទះខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດບອຣ໌ດສໍາລັບ cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸບອຣ໌ດໃນດ້ານເທິງ, ດ້ານສຸມ, ແລະດ້ານຂ້າງ, [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາວັດສະດຸຂອງບອຣ໌ດທ້າຍ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのためのボードサイズを計算します。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth]は総測定値であり、[BoardThick]は天板、底板、側板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick]は背景板の材料厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛을 위한 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 치수이며, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판, 측면 보드 자재의 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 자재의 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tablones para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] son las medidas totales, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material para la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour les planches supérieure, inférieure et latérales, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau pour la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialdicke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड का आकार गणना करें। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप हैं, [BoardThick] शीर्ष, नीचे और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Вычисляет размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина материала для верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — толщина материала для задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
